name: Wesfarmers Limited
analysis: WES has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$80.4600. Trade idea: entry A$85.2600, stop A$77.0517, target A$109.8849 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
